positive.prompt: The dashboard takes eight seconds to load, profile it and fix the bottleneck
Profile these slow database queries and add the right indexes
The orders endpoint has a slow N+1 query pattern, profile it and fix the bottleneck
Core Web Vitals are failing, improve our LCP

negative.prompt: Draft the deprecation notice for the v1 API
Design the public interface for the billing module

evals.prompt: The products page renders slowly with 1000 items. Improve its performance.
evals.expected_output: A measured baseline, an identified bottleneck, a targeted fix, and a verified improvement
expectations: Performance is measured before any optimization is applied
The fix targets the measured bottleneck rather than guessing
Improvement is verified against the baseline after the change
